name: Satziki
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dish towel, suspend 3 1/2 cups of yogurt and 1 tsp salt over a bowl until no more liquid drips through, approximately two hours.
2. Sprinkle salt evenly over the cucumber, then let it stand for 15 minutes before pressing dry.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and chill the mixture. Makes: 3 cups
